parameters.jsCode: const body = $json.body || $json; const subject = encodeURIComponent(`[QuantOdyssey] Research thesis: ${body.title || 'untitled'}`); const text = JSON.stringify(body, null, 2); const mailto = `mailto:luweiword@gmail.com?subject=${subject}&body=${encodeURIComponent(text)}`; return [{ json: { ok: true, received: body, notify: { email: 'luweiword@gmail.com', mailto }, note: 'SMTP/Gmail credentials are required for fully automatic email sending. This workflow returns a mailto link until credentials are configured.' } }];
